## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (e.g. `feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `chore:`).
- [ ] `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, `npm test`, and `npm run build` pass locally.
- [ ] Tests added or updated for this change.
- [ ] Docs and `CHANGELOG.md` (`Unreleased`) updated for any user-facing change.
- [ ] Commits are signed off (DCO): `git commit -s`.
- [ ] **No AI co-author trailer or attribution** in any commit — no `Co-Authored-By`, no "Generated with…", no robot-emoji attribution. (CI enforces this.)
